headline: How The CAVA Group (CAVA) Growth Narrative Is Evolving With New Guidance And Valuation Concerns
summary: CAVA Group’s blended fair value estimate now sits at about US$85.83 per share, compared with a prior figure of US$84, a modest 2.2% adjustment that has caught investors’ attention. This move comes as Street analysts react to recent earnings and 2026 guidance, weighing strong same store sales and unit economics against questions about how much of the upside case is already reflected in the share price. Read on to see what is driving these shifts and how you can follow the evolving analyst...
